revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:13:29
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7091463)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{deathyrBC|2|9}} {{Commons category}} {{citation needed|29 BC deaths}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:29 BC deaths]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

{{deathyrBC|2|9}}

{{citation needed|29 BC deaths}}

<!--interwikis-->

<!--categories-->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=29_BC_deaths here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
